title: clausena heptaphylla
intro: Clausena heptaphylla, also known as pokok seruni or seven-leafed bitter orange, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clausena heptaphylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Clausena heptaphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tonics, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a flavoring agent in some Southeast Asian dishes.
